transcript: Speaker A: दबंग फिल्म में पुलिस ऑफिसर का किरदार किसने निभाया था? अपने परिवार का सबसे अमीर आदमी बनने के लिए Download कीजिये Zinglish App [Who played the role of a police officer in the movie Dabangg? To become the richest person in your family, download the Zinglish App.]
on_screen_text:
“दबंग” फिल्म में पुलिस ऑफिसर का किरदार किसने निभाया था? [Who played the role of a police officer in the movie 'Dabangg'?]
Akshay Kumar
Salman Khan
Ajay Devgn
Bank of India + 2,01,108 Credited to Account 0002
अपने परिवार का सबसे अमीर आदमी बनने के लिए Download कीजिये Zinglish App 😍 [To become the richest person in your family, download the Zinglish App 😍]
Zinglish: English Speaking App
summary: The ad begins with a Bollywood trivia question to capture attention. Upon answering, a simulated bank credit notification is shown, suggesting financial gain. The voiceover then prompts viewers to download the Zinglish app to become wealthy.
